creator: salvadore@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Andreas Tobler from comment #25)

Thanks a lot for this patch.

Unfortunately, I am overwhelmed with PRs right now, so it might take some time for me to review and test your patch. But I appreciate it a lot and I hope to merge it before the switch to GCC_DEFAULT=13 so that we do not have a regression on address sanitizer by updating the default GCC version.

Thanks.
